name: Firehouse Hot Chili Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Grind the mixture to a fine powder using a mortar and pestle, or a food processor or blender.
3. The spice will keep for about 6 months on the pantry shelf.
To use: This powder is somewhat more pungent and fresher tasting than a packaged brand, so use a bit less.
Yield: 5.5 ounces
